headline: A Look At IQVIA Holdings (IQV) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: What IQVIA Holdings’ Recent Performance Tells You IQVIA Holdings (IQV) has attracted attention after a period of weak share performance, including a return of about 26% decline year to date and 26% decline over the past 3 months. At a last close of US$166.07 and a market value near US$27.9b, the company combines sizeable scale with a mixed recent return profile, including a 0.3% gain over the past month but a 10.7% decline over the past year.
